creator: bdorr1105@gmail.com
text: I have a chelsio T520-SO on a pfsense box that is running freeBSD 11.2 Release on version 2.4.4 of pfsense. On teh previous release, the network cards were recognized as a 10GB card, now they are only seen as a 1GB card. Not sure what is going on here, I have tried everything I could to try and get it working, but it appears to be capped at 1GB only. Need help
